description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the erlang:19.0.5 Docker image. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update -y, installs g++-4.9 with apt-get -y install g++-4.9, and sets the CXX environment variable to g++-4.9. Define a test job in the default test stage that executes ./rebar3 eunit followed by ./rebar3 ct. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
